name: video-editor
description: Deterministic local video editing with FFmpeg, an agent workflow, and a CodeShell dock panel.

interface.shortDescription: Trim, reframe, caption, and render local video
interface.longDescription: Plan and execute deterministic local video edits through FFmpeg and FFprobe.
defaultPrompt: Trim this video into a short clip.
Reframe this clip for a vertical 9:16 export.
Build a reviewed video edit plan and render it.
